subject: Sprint 3 complete — all tasks done
body:
Sprint 3 complete! Here's everything I did:

✅ Cloud shadow projection (CloudShadow.ts)
  - Projects cloud coverage onto globe surface
  - Multiply blending for natural shadow darkening
  - Sun angle affects shadow intensity

✅ Temporal accumulation (TAA) for clouds
  - History render target for previous frame
  - Blend shader combines current + history
  - Blue noise jitter for subpixel variation
  - Adaptive blend factor

✅ Scene lighting polish
  - Increased exposure to 1.2 for cloud visibility
  - Hemisphere light for sky/ground variation
  - Deep space blue-black background

✅ WebSocket server (server/ws.ts)
  - Real-time weather data streaming (30s interval)
  - Client subscription model
  - Compressed field data for bandwidth
  - Ping/pong heartbeat

✅ Updated AGENT_NOTES.md

Build: TypeScript clean, Vite 526KB (134KB gzip)

The project is looking really polished now. Great collaboration! 🚀
